description:
With Stream Deck, unleash your creative genius and make waves across Twitch and YouTube. All while focusing on what matters most your audience. As a broadcaster that likes to produce on the fly and have high quality production.


What's new in Stream Deck 7.4?

🎰 Introducing Stream Deck + Lever
You asked for more inputs. So we pulled some levers to make it happen.
Stream Deck + Lever is our most tactile device yet. It's got eight keys, four dials, a touch strip — and a lever. Assign an action to it. Pull it. It works exactly like any other key, just with significantly more drama (and effort).
Discover Stream Deck + Lever and give it a pull.

​The Slotius plugin is free on Elgato Marketplace (April 1st only!)
Turn your Stream Deck into a full slot machine. Fill at least 3×2 keys with the action, press any key to spin, and match symbols to win. Rare symbols pay more: diamonds hit 100x, cherries 5x. Adjust your bet between 10 and 100 credits and hold any key to check your stats.
No real money, just vibes. Get it free today: elgato.com/marketplace

Improvements and bug fixes
- Improved account sign-in behavior to address an issue where account authentication windows would pop up repeatedly in your browser — the app will no longer automatically open your browser to prompt for Twitch, YouTube, or other account logins.
- Updated Galleon 100 SD firmware (3.06.005), which resolves a display issue affecting some units. The update is applied automatically when your device connects.
- Added Model Context Protocol (MCP) to enable AI Assistants to control a new virtual Stream Deck. Learn more about configuring MCP Deck.
- (macOS) Updated default profiles for Galleon 100 SD and Stream Deck + XL.
- (Windows) Fixed an issue where Toggle Virtual Stream Deck key could appear visually stuck after the interface was re-opened. Functionality was not affected.
- (macOS) Fixed an issue where the Open Application action didn't display third-party apps in the dropdown list.
- Fixed a bug where nested Switch Profile actions inside a Multi Action could lose their internal references when imported.
- Fixed an issue where Key Logic displayed an overwrite confirmation when pasting into an empty key.

Want to share feedback on Stream Deck 7.4? Connect with us:
- Leave a comment on our Subreddit
- Chat with fellow community members on Discord
- Hit up @elgato on X
- Discover more on Explorer
- Contact our Support Team

1Password menu is available. Press down arrow to select.
